description:
I built 12 Claude Code skills that write, optimize, and audit blog posts - a free AI blog writer with SEO charts, sourced statistics, schema markup, and images from Pexels/Pixabay. All from slash commands.

4 AI agents research your topic, find current statistics from trusted sources, generate SVG data charts, pull royalty-free images, and write a full article optimized for Google rankings and AI citations from ChatGPT, Perplexity, and AI Overviews. You get a quality score, FAQ schema, and a publish-ready blog in under 5 minutes.

📝 EXAMPLE BLOG CREATED IN THIS VIDEO:
► How to Avoid AI Slop in 2026: https://rankenstein.pro/blog/how-to-avoid-ai-slop-2026

52% of online content is now AI slop. This tool helps you write the other 48% - the kind that actually ranks, earns traffic, and gets cited. No subscriptions. No dashboards. One install command. 

⏱️ TIMESTAMPS:
00:00 — What is Claude Blog? (12 Skills Overview)
00:24 — One-Command Install
00:36 — Live Demo: /blog write from Scratch
00:47 — Agent Questions: Topic, Audience, Format
02:15 — Plan of Action & Content Templates
03:13 — Behind the Scenes: Web Research & Image Search
03:42 — Results: Blog Post Complete in ~4 Minutes
04:00 — Blog Walkthrough: Cover Image, Title, Tags
05:10 — Content Deep Dive: Stats, TL;DR, Sources
06:13 — H2 Sections, Embedded Images & External Links
07:03 — SVG Charts Showcase (Built-In Data Visualization)
08:02 — FAQ, Insights, Quality Score (72/100)
08:42 — Adding Internal Links with a Prompt
09:07 — Fixing Chart Overlap Live
09:37 — Recap: What Claude Blog Skill Does
10:28 — Final Thoughts: Fighting AI Slop

🛠️ INSTALL CLAUDE BLOG:
► GitHub: https://github.com/AgriciDaniel/claude-blog

💻 INSTALL CLAUDE CODE + VS CODE:
► Claude Code Docs: https://code.claude.com/docs
► VS Code Download: https://code.visualstudio.com/

🔗 RELATED PROJECTS:
► Claude SEO (companion skill): https://github.com/AgriciDaniel/claude-seo
► Claude Ads (companion skill): https://github.com/AgriciDaniel/claude-ads

🎯 JOIN THE COMMUNITY:
► AI Marketing Hub (2,000+ members, free): https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub
► AI Marketing Hub Pro (theory to action, paid): https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub

🌐 WEBSITE USED IN DEMO:
► Rankenstein Pro: https://rankenstein.pro (where do u think this skill came from? =D )

👨‍💻 ABOUT ME:
I'm Daniel, host of AI Marketing Hub. I help 2,000+ members learn AI tools for marketing and automation. I build open-source tools because everyone deserves access to the good stuff.

🌐 Website: https://agricidaniel.com
📺 Subscribe: /@agricidaniel

This video covers: Claude Code skills, Claude Code tutorial, AI blog writer, AI blog writer free, AI content creation tool, AI SEO blog writer, best AI blog writer, AI slop, blog automation, open source AI writing, Claude Code blog skill, blog post generator with charts and images, schema markup generation, FAQ schema, AI slop blog fix, content quality 2026, blog writing tool free, SVG chart generator, AI blog writer with images, Pexels Pixabay blog images, and AI citation optimization.

#ClaudeCode #AIBlogWriter #AISlop #OpenSource #BlogWriting #AIMarketing #ContentCreation #SEO
